workflow.modelDescription: The model to use for this step.
workflow.autoApproveDescription: Skip manual approval for this step.
workflow.promptDescription: Override the system prompt used for this step.
workflow.contextGlobsDescription: Files to include as context. One glob per line.
workflow.defaultModelsDescription: Quickly set the default model for all steps.
workflow.defaultContextGlobsDescription: Fallback files to scan when no step-specific globs are set. One glob per line.
workflow.parallelConcurrencyDescription: Maximum number of parallel tasks to run.
workflow.triggersDescription: Automatically run actions when workflow events fire.
workflow.noActionsDefined: No actions defined. Create actions in the Actions tab.
